top_signals.title: Bank of England’s Breeden: Digital gilt will bring down borrowing costs
top_signals.summary: The Bank of England’s plans to launch a digital gilt will make Britain’s sovereign debt more appealing to a wider pool of investors and help bring down government borrowing costs, its deputy governor has said. Speaking to City AM at the City Week conference, Sarah Breeden hailed the central bank’s efforts to become the first [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: High Value Council Tax Surcharge
top_signals.summary: We are seeking views on the design and delivery of the High Value Council Tax Surcharge (HVCTS), a new charge on residential properties worth £2 million and above in England.

top_signals.title: Scientists Unveil ‘DNA Battery’ That Charges Directly From The Sun
top_signals.summary: The massive energy needs of AI servers and hyperscale data centers are driving a boom in grid storage. Standalone battery systems are scaling at an unprecedented rate to pair with solar and wind power, enhancing grid stability and base-load capability. The global BESS market is experiencing explosive structural growth, driven by the integration of renewable energy and declining lithium-ion costs.  Global BESS capacity is projected to surge by up to 15x in the current decade, with market value expected to exceed $100 billion by 2030. …
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: T20 leagues should be ranked into tiers, MLC’s San Francisco Unicorns chief says
top_signals.summary: Global T20 leagues should be ranked in tiers to ringfence the best competitions and players, according to the chief of Major League Cricket club the San Francisco Unicorns. David White – whose Unicorns team shares investors with Hundred team London Spirit – says world governing body the ICC will be forced to adjust the cricket [...]
